rationale: The proposed change to Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption has no relation to Educ. Code §12.1101, which governs charter school application notification procedures. No overlap in subject matter.
quote: Sec. 12.1101. NOTIFICATION OF CHARTER APPLICATION OR ESTABLISHMENT OF CAMPUS.
_note: No conflict; rule_text concerns charter school notification, unrelated to homestead exemption.
